title: OIDC Authentication Middleware Config
description: Configuration for the OIDC authentication middleware plugin

audience.description: Expected audience (aud) claim. If set, tokens must match.

required_scopes.description: Space-separated required scopes. If set, token must have all of them.

issuer_override.description: Override the expected issuer (iss) claim. Useful when the provider's internal URL differs from its external URL (e.g., Docker networking).

clock_skew_seconds.description: Clock skew tolerance in seconds for exp/nbf validation

jwks_refresh_seconds.description: How often to refresh JWKS keys (seconds)

timeout.description: HTTP timeout for discovery and JWKS calls (seconds)

allow_query_token.description: Allow token extraction from the access_token query parameter (RFC 6750 §2.3). Disabled by default — tokens in URLs risk leaking via logs and referer headers.

groups_claim.description: JWT claim to extract consumer groups from, replacing scope-based groups. Supports JSON Pointer (RFC 6901) for nested claims (e.g., "/realm_access/roles"). A plain name like "roles" is treated as "/roles".

groups_claim_separator.description: Separator for splitting a string-valued groups claim into multiple groups. Only used when the claim value is a string, not a JSON array. If omitted, a string claim is treated as a single group.
